name: docs-keeper
description: Documentation writer + hierarchical indexer + sources-of-truth registrar — stack-, domain-, product-agnostic. Provides the docs-keeper agent, /docs-keeper:* commands, and commit/session/capture hooks backed by a platform-neutral core engine.

DOCS_KEEPER_ENFORCE.description: Commit-time drift gate enforcement: 'block' fails the commit (exit 2) on documentation drift; 'warn' surfaces the queue but never blocks (exit 0). Exported to the hooks as the DOCS_KEEPER_ENFORCE environment variable.
